titleStmt.title: SII 30.214: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 214. (A.R. No. 289 of 1915.) Vikravāṇḍi, Villupuram Taluk, South Arcot District. Varadarāja Perumāḷ Temple—on the north and west walls of the central shrine Vīra-Narasimharāya: Śaka 1431, Sukla, Kaṟkaṭaka, su.di. 5, Friday, Hasta: 1509 A.D. Sunday (seems to be wrong), July 22

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of a village which was a hamlet of Vikkirapāṇḍi in Vīḍūr-Paṟṟu, in Oymān-vaḷanāḍu, in Palkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam, a sub-division of Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻamaṇḍalam to the temple of Varadarāja Perumāḷ at Vikkiramapāṇḍi as tirunāmattukkāṇi by a feudatory Tribhuvanavīrakulaveṉṉa Samma[ṭṭi] Pottiyadēva Sōḻamahārājaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . man mahāmaṇḍeleśvaran hariyarāya vibhāṭan pāṣaikkut tappuvarāyira kaṇṭaṉ muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu koṭātāṉ pūṟuva dekṣaṇa paścima Uttara catusamudrātipati misara kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri sāḷuva bhujabaladeva mahārāya kumārar viranarasimharāyar pritvirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa sakāptam 1000 4 100 3 10 1 ṉ cellāniṉṟa sukla samvatsarattu karkkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvva pakṣattu
padvamiyim śukravāramum peṟṟa Astattu nāḷ śrī manmahāmaṇḍeleśvara tribhuvana virakulaveṉṉa cammaṭṭi pottiya devar coḻa mahārājan jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu palkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu Oymāṉ vaḷanāṭṭu vīṭurpaṟṟu vikkarapāṇṭi piṭākai Āṉa malaikgrāmam Oṉṟu(ṟu)kku kallu maṭakuḷḷa nāṟpāṟkellaiyum śvāmikku puṇyamāka vikramapāṇṭiyil perumāḷ varadarājaṟku
tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka viṭṭamaikku candrāditya varaikkum celvatākavum Itu kalveṭṭuppaṭi ..
Digital edition of SII 30.214 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
